task_completion.description: Create the 'Network Operations Team' technician group.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Network Operations Team' in the Technician Groups list or a success message indicating the group was created in the admin settings.

task_completion.description: Create the 'Hardware Support Team' technician group.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Hardware Support Team' in the Technician Groups list or a success message indicating the group was created in the admin settings.

task_completion.description: Add technician 'Maya Patel' and assign to the Network Operations Team.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a technician profile or list entry for 'Maya Patel' with login 'mpatel' and email 'mpatel@company.local', showing membership/assignment to the 'Network Operations Team'.

task_completion.description: Add technician 'Carlos Rivera' and assign to the Hardware Support Team.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a technician profile or list entry for 'Carlos Rivera' with login 'crivera' and email 'crivera@company.local', showing membership/assignment to the 'Hardware Support Team'.

task_completion.description: Assign the VPN connectivity request to the Network Operations Team.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the ticket list or ticket details for ID 1004 ('VPN connection dropping every 30 minutes') showing the 'Group' field set to 'Network Operations Team'.

task_completion.description: Assign the laptop keyboard request to the Hardware Support Team.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the ticket list or ticket details for ID 1001 ('Laptop keyboard not responding') showing the 'Group' field set to 'Hardware Support Team'.

integrity.description: The agent used the ServiceDesk Plus web interface to perform the configurations.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the web browser navigating the ServiceDesk Plus GUI (Admin panel, Requests module), not terminal commands or database queries.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual application rather than a text editor or mock interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Visuals should include standard ServiceDesk Plus menus, forms, and tables, rather than text files containing the required names and emails.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the results.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the browser developer console (F12) is not open and being used to alter the DOM to display the expected group names or ticket assignments.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Group 1: 'Network Operations Team'. Group 2: 'Hardware Support Team'. Technician 1: 'Maya Patel' (login: mpatel, email: mpatel@company.local), assigned to Network Operations Team. Technician 2: 'Carlos Rivera' (login: crivera, email: crivera@company.local), assigned to Hardware Support Team. VPN Ticket: ID 1004 ('VPN connection dropping every 30 minutes'), must be assigned to Network Operations Team. Keyboard Ticket: ID 1001 ('Laptop keyboard not responding'), must be assigned to Hardware Support Team.
